data.body:
## Description

Write a failing bash test at tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh that verifies CLAUDE.md contains no v2 ticket system references (tk command and .tickets/ path). This is a RED test task — it must FAIL before the implementation task (f14b-d217) runs.

## TDD Requirement

This IS the RED test task. After writing it, confirm it FAILS (RED) against the current CLAUDE.md. After task f14b-d217 updates CLAUDE.md, this test must pass GREEN.

## Tests to write

### test_no_tk_cmd_in_claude_md
Grep CLAUDE.md for tk command references: 'the tk wrapper', 'tk write commands', 'not the tk Session Close'. Must return zero active matches.

### test_no_v2_tickets_path_in_claude_md
Grep CLAUDE.md for '.tickets/' (v2 worktree path). The v3 path is .tickets-tracker/. Must return zero matches.

## Implementation steps
1. Create tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh following the pattern in tests/scripts/test-no-yaml-config-refs.sh
2. Use: source tests/lib/assert.sh, SCRIPT_DIR/PLUGIN_ROOT/REPO_ROOT variables
3. chmod +x tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh
4. Run test to confirm it FAILS (RED) — must fail because CLAUDE.md has v2 refs

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_no_tk_cmd_in_claude_md
  Verify: grep -q 'test_no_tk_cmd_in_claude_md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh
- [ ] Test file contains test_no_v2_tickets_path_in_claude_md
  Verify: grep -q 'test_no_v2_tickets_path_in_claude_md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh
- [ ] Running test against current CLAUDE.md returns non-zero (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
